functions.name: local-zipfile-lambda
functions.notes: Converted from Lambda to Railway Function with HTTP endpoint

functions.name: s3-zipfile-lambda
functions.notes: Converted from Lambda to Railway Function with HTTP endpoint

easy_wins: API Gateway functionality replaced by Railway Functions' built-in HTTP handling
No need for IAM roles/policies - Railway handles authentication
SSL/TLS certificates handled automatically by Railway
DNS can be configured directly in Railway UI
limitations: Custom domain setup is less flexible than Route53
No direct equivalent to API Gateway method settings
Cannot do complex request/response mappings like in API Gateway
manual_steps: Configure custom domain in Railway UI
Update DNS records to point to Railway-provided domain
Port Lambda function code to Railway Function format
Configure environment variables in Railway UI

lambda_analysis.reason: Based on the infrastructure, these appear to be HTTP-triggered Lambdas behind API Gateway, perfect for Railway Functions
